creator: dfrazier@magpage.com
text:
better workaround:

disable the "Enable launch feedback" option in
gnomecontrolcenter->Desktop->LaunchFeedback.

I noted this in my post "wierdness with xalf and linux-netscape..." on
Mon, 04 Jun 2001.
